title: 16 inch Cable Ties 100 Pack, 400mm x 4.8mm Black Long Zip Ties, Tensile Strength 50 lbs with UV Resistant, Nylon Plastic Self Locking Heavy Duty Cable Wrap for Tidy Wires Home Workshop and Garden
features: ✅【Size and Quantity】100 pack, Black Cable Ties, Long 16 in (400mm), Wide: 0.18 in (4.8mm), Tensile Strength: 22kg (Longer size ties are used in a wider range of applications)

✅【High Quality Material】 It is made of PA66 nylon material with a tensile strength of 22kg(50lbs), Active working temperature: -25°C to 85°C, Strong weather resistance and High temperature Resistance. It can be used for outdoors
✅【Self - Locking Design】 It can fix the object in the right position very securely, and with each pull it becomes tighter, so it is easy to handle and the jamming is prevented

✅【Widely Used】 This multifunctional cable tie is widely used for organizing cables, gardening, attaching bicycles and closing suitcases. It is very suitable for organizing at home, in the office, in the garage, while traveling and in workshops. If you want to arrange different wires, zippers and other accessories, this is a good choice

✅【Quality Assurance】 The cable tie is pressed by exquisite technology, the surface of which is smooth. The zipper teeth are burr-free, so the cable tie is easy to tighten. We offer high quality cable ties, Thank you for choosing us
description: Product Description About Our Products: 1. You will receive black100 pack cable ties (4.8*400mm), Tensile Strength: 22kg/50lbs 2. Made of new nylon, high strength, anti-aging, durability and strong carrying capacity! 3. The cable tie is thickened to increase the tensile strength and can reach up to 55kg without fear of breaking or loosening! 4. The self - locking nylon cable tie can meet different requirements in work and life for a long time, the demanding industrial and construction applications, and solve the problems for you!
